title: Change of Catalog - Step by Step Guide
content:
Change of Catalog
Morgan State University - Office of the Registrar

This guide is for STUDENTS. It explains how to submit a Change of Catalog request through the Service Request system.

---

STEP 1: ENTER YOUR NAME
Enter your name in the format: Last Name, First Name.

---

STEP 2: ENTER YOUR MAJOR
Enter your current major.

---

STEP 3: ENTER GPA AND TOTAL CREDITS EARNED
Enter your GPA and total credits earned. You can find this information on your unofficial transcript, in Degreeworks, or on your student profile.

---

STEP 4: VERIFY CURRICULUM REQUIREMENTS
Advisement from your chairperson or advisor is recommended before submitting this request. Curriculum requirements can be found in the Academic Catalog.

You must acknowledge the following before proceeding:
- You are changing from your original catalog.
- You must complete all degree requirements listed in the new catalog.
- You cannot revert back to your previous catalog once the change is processed.

---

STEP 5: ENTER CURRENT AND PROPOSED CATALOG
Enter your current catalog and proposed catalog. Use the format: semester and year (for example, Fall 2006 for current catalog and Fall 2020 for proposed catalog).

---

STEP 6: SUBMIT
Submit the form. Processing takes up to 10 business days. Both the Chairperson and Dean must approve the request.

---

NOTIFICATION AND STATUS
You will receive an email notification once the change has been completed. You can check the status of your request anytime through Service Request.

For the full official guide with screenshots, view: [Change of Catalog Guide](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1ok9YDZMmll8TLVvB24CRGENDrud3-H7s/view)
